Solutions

Industry-ready delivery for regulated growth

Map services to business outcomes by industry: healthcare, financial services, SaaS, retail, manufacturing, and public sector.

Service to solution mapping

Built around buyer context, not a menu of everything.

The SRS warns against looking like a company that does everything in IT. This solutions layer groups CGIT capabilities around the industries and compliance realities buyers care about.

Industry

Healthcare & Life Sciences

Secure software, data, automation, and QA programs for healthcare, pharma, and life sciences teams.

Compliance context

HIPAAHITECHGDPRPIPEDA21 CFR Part 11
Industry

Financial Services & Banking

Cloud, QA, analytics, and platform modernization for banks, lenders, fintechs, insurers, and mortgage teams.

Compliance context

PCI-DSSSOXSOC 1SOC 2GLBAPSD2
Industry

Technology & SaaS

AI-first engineering, product development, infrastructure, QA automation, and data platforms for scaling software teams.

Compliance context

ISO 27001NISTFedRAMPCCPA
Industry

Retail & E-Commerce

Omnichannel systems, commerce platforms, analytics, and payment-security programs for growth-stage retailers.

Compliance context

GDPRCCPAPCI-DSSConsumer Protection
Industry

Manufacturing & Supply Chain

Data visibility, ERP workflows, cloud infrastructure, and security programs for operationally complex teams.

Compliance context

ITARCMMCISO 9001ISO 14001
Industry

Public Sector & Government

Security-first cloud, data, and infrastructure programs designed for public-sector compliance and resilience.

Compliance context

FISMAFedRAMPGDPRPIPEDA

AI and data

Define opportunities, govern data, engineer pipelines, and deploy AI use cases that can survive security review.

Enterprise platforms

Transforming businesses with tomorrow's technology, today. Global IT services across 4 countries, 500+ projects, 12 years of experience, and 95% client retention.
